## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      5 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 9, 2026 - Jul 1, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Luffe DeluXe_, May 9, 2026, 1/5: "This app is only getting more and more unstable and unusable, you're seriously sinking your own ship..."
            2. _Patrich Brandt_, Jun 10, 2026, 2/5: "horrible new update icl. the UI looks off and didn't require a change at all. if it isn't broken, don't fix it"
            3. _Dede Brooklyn_, May 17, 2026, 2/5: "App is often unstable e.g. in the form of players not working; being unable to go back and forth on a playing audio file, channels being slow at updating, being unable to stop a playing video file without constantly ended up in a start/stop loop, etc."

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      1 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 13, 2026 - Jul 13, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Eleonora Contini_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "my account was unfairly banned recently (due to the bugs that are happening) and I messaged them on Twitter (or I spent a lot of money on my Discord account and so far they haven't even given me the option to get my money back."
